title: Włocławek, Kuyavian-Pomeranian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Włocławek, Kuyavian-Pomeranian: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Włocławek is a city in Kuyavian-Pomeranian with a population of 109,347. A historic city on the Vistula River, known for its ceramics industry, Gothic cathedral, and the Włocławek Dam hydroelectric plant.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
